system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son3_tongbuocson","body":"CREATE   PROC [dbo].[TR_DINHMUC_SON3_TONGBUOCSON](@donhang nvarchar(max), @uv int = 0)
AS
BEGIN
	--DECLARE @donhang nvarchar(max) = 'RAY-31300, RAY-31301, RAY-31302'

	-- LẤY THÔNG TIN ĐƠN HÀNG
	SELECT B.hehang, B.masp, B.tensp, B.mausac, SUM(A.order_qty) AS soluong_donhang 
	INTO #DONHANG_SANXUAT
	FROM tr_order_detail A INNER JOIN tr_sanpham B ON A.item_number = B.masp
	WHERE A.order_number IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM string_split(@donhang, ','))
		AND A.f_cancelled = 'N' AND ISNULL(A.khongtinhson, 0) = 0
	GROUP BY B.hehang, B.masp, B.tensp, B.mausac

	-- TÍNH SỐ MÉT VUÔNG CÁC MẶT CỦA ĐƠN HÀNG
	SELECT C.mausac, 
		MV_MAT_A = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_A' THEN A.metvuong * c.soluong_donhang END),
		MV_MAT_B = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_B' THEN A.metvuong * c.soluong_donhang END),
		MV_MAT_C = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_C' THEN A.metvuong * c.soluong_donhang END),
		MV_MAT_D = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_D' THEN A.metvuong * c.soluong_donhang END),
		MV_MAT_E = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_E' THEN A.metvuong * c.soluong_donhang END),
		MV_MAT_F = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_F' THEN A.metvuong * c.soluong_donhang END),
		MV_MAT_G = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_G' THEN A.metvuong * c.soluong_donhang END),
		MV_MAT_H = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_H' THEN A.metvuong * c.soluong_donhang END),
		MV_MAT_I = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_I' THEN A.metvuong * c.soluong_donhang END)
	INTO #METVUONG_DONHANG
	FROM tr_dinhmuc_son3_metvuong A
		INNER JOIN #DONHANG_SANXUAT C ON A.masp = C.masp
	WHERE A.metvuong > 0
	GROUP BY C.mausac

	-- TÍNH KHỐI LƯỢNG SƠN CÁC MẶT ĐƠN HÀNG
	SELECT C.mausac, A.buoc, 
		KHOILUONGTONG = SUM(A.soluong * B.metvuong * c.soluong_donhang),
		KL_MAT_A = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_A' THEN A.soluong * B.metvuong * c.soluong_donhang END),
		KL_MAT_B = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_B' THEN A.soluong * B.metvuong * c.soluong_donhang END),
		KL_MAT_C = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_C' THEN A.soluong * B.metvuong * c.soluong_donhang END),
		KL_MAT_D = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_D' THEN A.soluong * B.metvuong * c.soluong_donhang END),
		KL_MAT_E = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_E' THEN A.soluong * B.metvuong * c.soluong_donhang END),
		KL_MAT_F = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_F' THEN A.soluong * B.metvuong * c.soluong_donhang END),
		KL_MAT_G = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_G' THEN A.soluong * B.metvuong * c.soluong_donhang END),
		KL_MAT_H = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_H' THEN A.soluong * B.metvuong * c.soluong_donhang END),
		KL_MAT_I = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_I' THEN A.soluong * B.metvuong * c.soluong_donhang END)
	INTO #KHOILUONG_DONHANG
	FROM tr_dinhmuc_son3 A
		INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_son3_metvuong B ON A.masp = B.masp AND A.matson = B.matson
		INNER JOIN #DONHANG_SANXUAT C ON A.masp = C.masp
	WHERE A.makhuvuc = 'SON' AND A.soluong * B.metvuong > 0
		AND CASE WHEN COALESCE(A.tinhtrang_uv, '') = '' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END = @uv
	GROUP BY C.mausac, A.buoc
	
	-- BẢNG TỔNG HỢP SỐ MÉT VUÔNG VÀ KHỐI LƯỢNG SƠN CỦA ĐƠN HÀNG
	SELECT B.mausac, B.buoc, 
		A.MV_MAT_A, A.MV_MAT_B, A.MV_MAT_C, A.MV_MAT_D, A.MV_MAT_E, A.MV_MAT_F, A.MV_MAT_G, A.MV_MAT_H, A.MV_MAT_I,
		B.KL_MAT_A, B.KL_MAT_B, B.KL_MAT_C, B.KL_MAT_D, B.KL_MAT_E, B.KL_MAT_F, B.KL_MAT_G, B.KL_MAT_H, B.KL_MAT_I,
		B.KHOILUONGTONG
	FROM #METVUONG_DONHANG A
		INNER JOIN #KHOILUONG_DONHANG B ON A.mausac = B.mausac

	DROP TABLE #DONHANG_SANXUAT,#METVUONG_DONHANG, #KHOILUONG_DONHANG;
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.string_split","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son3","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son3_metvuong","dbo.tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
